sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5157" key="a)menqh/ristos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμενθήριστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n5157.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not careful,</tr_> Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9010.tlg001:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">59</biblScope> </bibl> (codd. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀπενθ-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
